title: Designing a Cybersecurity Framework
scenario: Develop a comprehensive cybersecurity framework for a fintech company with multiple branch offices worldwide. The prompt should include a detailed description of security controls, risk mitigation strategies, and incident response procedures.
constraints: Must be structured according to NIST Cybersecurity Framework guidelines
Must include at least 5 specific security controls for data encryption

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated markdown adheres to all constraints.
Evaluates the completeness and effectiveness of security controls.
Verifies the soundness and thoroughness of risk mitigation strategies.
Checks the responsiveness and comprehensiveness of incident response procedures.
